rationale: The citing paper references Dhar and Simonson (2003) once in the theoretical background as an example that externally constrained choice can increase conflict and discomfort relative to delaying choice. This citation helps motivate a general claim that consumers value freedom of choice, but it is not used to build specific hypotheses, operationalizations, or analyses in the four studies. The cited work is not revisited in the results interpretation or contribution claims, indicating a background-support role rather than a direct substantive dependency.
